title: 一套 Spec-First 的 AI 编程工作流
abstract: 一套 Spec-First 的 AI 编程工作流 simplifies AI automation by letting you describe workflows in natural language and then executing them step by step. Ideal for teams with more ideas than hands.
abstract_zh: 试过没日没夜写代码的绝望？来试试这套 **Spec-First** AI 编程工作流吧，它能让你从枯燥中解脱出来，就像从泥潭里捞出一只小企鹅一样轻松！
